calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Off Calendar

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Doug Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
Exhibit 1 (attached to complaint) - Declaration of Ernest Knowles---ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 (attached to complaint) - Commercial Lease Agreement------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 (attached to complaint) - Personal Guaranty---------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the filed declaration in support of the Default Judgement, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Edwards Excavating, LLC and Matthew J. Edwards as follows:
Principal $85,859.55
Prejudgment Interest $3,739.68
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $465.00, for a total of $92,564.23
Plaintiff is entitled to its immediate possession of the leased equipment listed in the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
